title: Montmartre sur Seine
writer: André Cayatte, Georges Lacombe, Serge Veber
actors: Édith Piaf, Jean-Louis Barrault, Roger Duchesne
plot: Maurice loves Juliet and Michael loves Lily. Romance blossoms on the hill. They are workers, artisans, and Lily has a real talent as a singer. But Claude's arrival brings trouble to their relationships. Maurice, jealous, approache...
